title: Restaurant Addons
description: The next best decorating mod for your restaurant.
body:
![banner_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87fb354ad8bb8507095df8b65d8dc7ef8db74a9c.png)
![head_version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/320105255af3e845111f2609ffa19063e048bc67.jpeg)
![separador-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90395f0718b8a49f666af5d30edd8dc99ed6219e.png)

### 📒 About the mod:

Discover Restaurant Addons, the new mod for Minecraft that will allow you to create your restaurants from multiple cultures and regions with fully functional blocks and elements and decorative elements so you can become the chef you've always wanted.

The mod is initially available for the latest versions of Minecraft Forge. A version for Fabric and other mod engines is expected to be released later.

The mod is still in early development and does not have all the content that is planned to be added, and may contain bugs or may be modified textures or elements of the mod.

You can follow the development of the mod on the twitter profile of its developer [Braismp007](https://twitter.com/Braismp007).
